reason_not_scorable: This is an educational/research presentation (ROSIM study April 2023) comparing robotic surgical training modalities (VR simulator vs dry lab). The first frame shows a da Vinci surgical simulator with a trainee, but the remainder is a slide presentation discussing study design, outcomes, force measurements, and qualitative analysis. No individual FLS task performance is being recorded or evaluated.
presentation_topic: Feasibility, effectiveness and transferability of virtual reality robotic training platform for general surgery residents
key_study_elements: Randomized crossover trial of 20 robotic novices
Comparison of VR + dry lab vs dry lab + VR training sequences
Outcome measures: OSATS scores, force measurements (ForceSense), qualitative analysis
Results: VR non-inferior to dry lab; VR-dry lab sequence superior to dry lab-VR
Conclusion: Equal surgical performance after single training with VR versus dry lab
scoring_note: This is an instructional/research presentation, not a performance video. No FLS task scoring is appropriate. If FLS task performance video is available, please provide the specific task recording.
